LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFFS ALICIA VICTORIO AND CONRADO VICTORIO'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUNE 12, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 14, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: MATTER ARGUED. AT CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFFS ALICIA VICTORIO AND CONRADO VICTORIO'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AMENDED COMPLAINT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

CAROLE RUWART, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.4700, FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING: matter argued. at conclusion of argument, the court grants PLAINTIFFs ALICIA VICTORIO and CONRADO VICTORIO's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Complaint. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Complt
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Continued To Jun-12-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFs ALICIA VICTORIO and CONRADO VICTORIO's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Complaint is Continued on the court's own motion to June 12, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 14, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
